name: rna_deg
description: RNA-seq differential expression table converted to signed gene programs and GMT gene sets

inputs.name: deg_tsv
inputs.description: Differential expression table for one contrast

inputs.name: gtf
inputs.description: Optional GTF for gene symbol/biotype annotation

parameters.name: signature_name
parameters.help: Label included in metadata and GMT names; default 'contrast' resolves to deg_tsv stem

parameters.name: gene_symbol_column
parameters.help: Optional symbol column override (auto-detects gene_symbol|gene_name when unset)

parameters.name: stat_column
parameters.help: Signed statistic column for score_mode=stat (auto-detects stat when unset)

parameters.name: logfc_column
parameters.help: Log fold-change column for score modes that use effect size (auto-detects log2fc|log2FoldChange|logFC|avg_log2FC when unset)

parameters.name: padj_column
parameters.help: Adjusted p-value column (auto-detects padj|FDR|adj.P.Val when unset)

parameters.name: pvalue_column
parameters.help: P-value fallback column (auto-detects pvalue|PValue|P.Value when unset)

parameters.name: score_mode
parameters.help: Signed score definition. signed_neglog10padj is the recommended default for stable library-style signatures; logfc is an effect-size-first alternative; logfc_times_neglog10p is a hybrid compromise.

parameters.name: padj_max
parameters.help: Optional adjusted p-value filter applied before gene aggregation

parameters.name: pvalue_max
parameters.help: Optional p-value filter applied before gene aggregation

parameters.name: min_abs_logfc
parameters.help: Optional abs(logFC) filter applied before gene aggregation

parameters.name: postprocess_mode
parameters.help: RNA DEG post-processing preset. harmonizome is the default; legacy preserves prior behavior.

parameters.name: duplicate_gene_policy
parameters.help: How duplicate gene_id rows are aggregated

parameters.name: exclude_gene_regex
parameters.help: Repeatable regexes to exclude genes by symbol

parameters.name: gtf_gene_id_field
parameters.help: GTF attribute to use as gene_id

parameters.name: gmt_require_symbol
parameters.help: Drop rows without usable symbols for GMT

parameters.name: gmt_split_signed
parameters.help: Emit __pos and __neg sets from signed scores

parameters.name: gmt_emit_abs
parameters.help: Emit an additional abs(score)-ranked GMT set family

parameters.name: gmt_source
parameters.help: Source rows for GMT export; default full ranked table

outputs.name: geneset.tsv
outputs.description: Selected gene program (signed score + nonnegative weight)
